# Sheikh Muhammad Qasim — ML Architect

> 8+ years building production AI systems at enterprise scale. Founder of Reallytics.ai.

## About
- Name: Sheikh Muhammad Qasim
- Role: ML Architect & Founder at Reallytics.ai
- Expertise: RAG, LLM Fine-Tuning, Voice AI, Multi-Agent Systems, Fraud Detection
- Location: Lahore, Pakistan
- Status: Open to senior IC or lead roles in ML/Data Science (remote); also available for consulting
- GitHub: https://github.com/smqd19
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/smqd19
- Education: MS Data Science (NUCES FAST) | BS Computer Science (COMSATS)

## Core Competencies
- Generative AI: LLM fine-tuning (LoRA, QLoRA, PEFT), RLHF (PPO, DPO), prompt engineering, function calling
- Retrieval-Augmented Generation: FAISS, ChromaDB, PG-Vector, cross-encoder re-ranking, hybrid search
- Agentic AI: Multi-agent orchestration, tool use, LangChain agents, MCP integration
- Voice AI: Real-time speech-to-text, 10M+ concurrent calls, sub-300ms latency
- MLOps: Model serving (vLLM, TorchServe), Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, monitoring
- Cloud: AWS (SageMaker, Bedrock, Lambda), Azure, GCP

## Key Repositories
- Digital-Me: AI-powered digital clone — Next.js + FastAPI
- RAG_Technical_Support: RAG-powered support with self-evaluation pipeline
- LLM_Fine_Tuning_Showdown: Head-to-head comparison of fine-tuning approaches
- cyber-physical-guard: Fleet monitoring with Confluent Cloud, Flink, and Gemini
- customer-support-agent: AI chatbot with MCP integration

## Professional Experience
- Founder & ML Architect at Reallytics.ai — Voice AI, RAG, fraud detection, AI agents
- Principal ML Lead at NorthBay Solutions — demand forecasting for 50M+ records
- Senior Data Scientist at 9T5 — crypto forecasting and computer vision
- Software Engineer at Afiniti — ML pipelines for call-routing optimization
